data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for completion photo evidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the completion photo evidence requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The only related evidence is a summary of the use case, which does not demonstrate actual implementation or validation of the requirement. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for validating completion photo evidence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for completion photo evidence.
